        "contents": "const InnerConnectionDetail = ({ data, closed, onClose }: InnerProps) =\u003e {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const { metadata, rulePayload, ruleDetail } = data;\n  const theme = useTheme();\n  const chains = [...data.chains].reverse().join(\" / \");\n  const rule = rulePayload\n    ? ruleDetail\n      ? &#96;${rulePayload} --\u003e [${ruleDetail}]&#96;\n      : rulePayload\n    : data.rule;\n  const host = metadata.host\n    ? &#96;${metadata.host}:${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;\n    : &#96;${metadata.remoteDestination}:${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;;\n  const Destination = metadata.destinationIP\n    ? metadata.destinationIP\n    : metadata.remoteDestination;\n\n  const information = [\n    { label: t(\"connections.components.fields.host\"), value: host },\n    {\n      label: t(\"shared.labels.downloaded\"),\n      value: parseTraffic(data.download).join(\" \"),\n    },\n    {\n      label: t(\"shared.labels.uploaded\"),\n      value: parseTraffic(data.upload).join(\" \"),\n    },\n    {\n      label: t(\"connections.components.fields.dlSpeed\"),\n      value: parseTraffic(data.curDownload ?? -1).join(\" \") + \"/s\",\n    },\n    {\n      label: t(\"connections.components.fields.ulSpeed\"),\n      value: parseTraffic(data.curUpload ?? -1).join(\" \") + \"/s\",\n    },\n    {\n      label: t(\"connections.components.fields.chains\"),\n      value: chains,\n    },\n    { label: t(\"connections.components.fields.rule\"), value: rule },\n    {\n      label: t(\"connections.components.fields.process\"),\n      value: &#96;${metadata.process}${metadata.processPath ? &#96;(${metadata.processPath})&#96; : \"\"}&#96;,\n    },\n    {\n      label: t(\"connections.components.fields.time\"),\n      value: dayjs(data.start).fromNow(),\n    },\n    {\n      label: t(\"connections.components.fields.source\"),\n      value: &#96;${metadata.sourceIP}:${metadata.sourcePort}&#96;,\n    },\n    {\n      label: t(\"connections.components.fields.destination\"),\n      value: Destination,\n    },\n    {\n      label: t(\"connections.components.fields.destinationPort\"),\n      value: &#96;${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;,\n    },\n    {\n      label: t(\"connections.components.fields.type\"),\n,\n  ];\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const getConnectionCellValue = (field: ColumnField, each: IConnectionsItem) =\u003e {\n  const { metadata, rulePayload, ruleDetail } = each;\n\n  switch (field) {\n    case \"host\":\n      return metadata.host\n        ? &#96;${metadata.host}:${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;\n        : &#96;${metadata.remoteDestination}:${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;;\n    case \"download\":\n      return each.download;\n    case \"upload\":\n      return each.upload;\n    case \"dlSpeed\":\n      return each.curDownload;\n    case \"ulSpeed\":\n      return each.curUpload;\n    case \"chains\":\n      return [...each.chains].reverse().join(\" / \");\n    case \"rule\":\n      if (rulePayload) {\n        return ruleDetail ? &#96;${rulePayload} --\u003e [${ruleDetail}]&#96; : rulePayload;\n      }\n      return each.rule;\n    case \"process\":\n      return truncateStr(metadata.process || metadata.processPath);\n    case \"time\":\n      return each.start;\n    case \"source\":\n      return &#96;${metadata.sourceIP}:${metadata.sourcePort}&#96;;\n    case \"remoteDestination\":\n      return metadata.destinationIP\n        ? &#96;${metadata.destinationIP}:${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;\n        : &#96;${metadata.remoteDestination}:${metadata.destinationPort}&#96;;\n    case \"type\":\n      return &#96;${metadata.type}(${metadata.network})&#96;;\n    default:\n      return \"\";\n  }\n};\n\ninterface Props {\n  connections: IConnectionsItem[];\n;\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "suspend fun patchConnections(snapshot: ConnectionsSnapshot) {\n        lastSnapshot = snapshot\n        val sorted = snapshot.connections.sortedBy { it.start }.let { list -\u003e\n            if (sortNewestFirst) list.asReversed() else list\n        }\n        val nowMs = System.currentTimeMillis()\n        val intervalSec = if (previousTimeMs \u003e 0) (nowMs - previousTimeMs) / 1000.0 else 1.0\n        val intervalSecClamped = if (intervalSec \u003c 0.5) 1.0 else intervalSec\n\n        val displayItems = sorted.map { conn -\u003e\n            val prev = previousTraffic[conn.id]\n            val downloadSpeedBps = if (prev != null) {\n                ((conn.download - prev.second) / intervalSecClamped).toLong().coerceAtLeast(0)\n            } else 0L\n            val trafficLine = \"↓ ${conn.download.toBytesString()} (${downloadSpeedBps.toSpeedString()})\"\n            ConnectionDisplayItem(conn, trafficLine)\n        }\n\n        previousTraffic = snapshot.connections.associate { it.id to (it.upload to it.download) }\n        previousTimeMs = nowMs\n\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            adapter.patchDataSet(adapter::displayItems, displayItems, detectMove = true) { it.connection.id }\n        }\n    }\n\n    init {\n        binding.self = this\n        binding.activityBarLayout.applyFrom(context)\n        binding.recyclerList.applyLinearAdapter(context, adapter)\n        binding.sortOrderView.setOnClickListener { toggleSortOrder() }\n    }\n\n    private fun toggleSortOrder() {\n        sortNewestFirst = !sortNewestFirst\n        lastSnapshot?.let { snapshot -\u003e launch { patchConnections(snapshot) } }\n    }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "contents": "export interface ConnectionWithSpeed extends IConnectionsItem {\n  curUpload: number;\n  curDownload: number;\n}\n\nexport interface ConnectionSpeedData {\n  id: string;\n  upload: number;\n;\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ConnectionItem = (props: Props) =\u003e {\n  const { value, closed, onShowDetail } = props;\n\n  const { id, metadata, chains, start, curUpload, curDownload } = value;\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n\n  const onDelete = useLockFn(async () =\u003e closeConnection(id));\n  const showTraffic = curUpload! \u003e= 100 || curDownload! \u003e= 100;\n\n  return (\n    \u003cListItem\n      dense\n      sx={{ borderBottom: \"1px solid var(--divider-color)\" }}\n      secondaryAction={\n        !closed \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cIconButton\n            edge=\"end\"\n            color=\"inherit\"\n            onClick={onDelete}\n            title={t(\"connections.components.actions.closeConnection\")}\n            aria-label={t(\"connections.components.actions.closeConnection\")}\n          \u003e\n            \u003cCloseRounded /\u003e\n          \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n        )\n      }\n    \u003e\n      \u003cListItemText\n        sx={{ userSelect: \"text\", cursor: \"pointer\" }}\n        primary={metadata.host || metadata.destinationIP}\n        onClick={onShowDetail}\n        secondary={\n          \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", flexWrap: \"wrap\" }}\u003e\n            \u003cTag sx={{ textTransform: \"uppercase\", color: \"success\" }}\u003e\n              {metadata.network}\n            \u003c/Tag\u003e\n\n            \u003cTag\u003e{metadata.type}\u003c/Tag\u003e\n\n            {!!metadata.process \u0026\u0026 \u003cTag\u003e{metadata.process}\u003c/Tag\u003e}\n\n            {chains?.length \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 (\n              \u003cTag\u003e{[...chains].reverse().join(\" / \")}\u003c/Tag\u003e\n            )}\n\n            \u003cTag\u003e{dayjs(start).fromNow()}\u003c/Tag\u003e\n\n            {showTraffic \u0026\u0026 (\n              \u003cTag\u003e\n                {parseTraffic(curUpload!)} / {parseTraffic(curDownload!)}\n              \u003c/Tag\u003e\n            )}\n          \u003c/Box\u003e\n        }\n      /\u003e\n    \u003c/ListItem\u003e\n  );\n};",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "interface IConnectionsItem {\n  id: string;\n  metadata: {\n    network: string;\n    type: string;\n    host: string;\n    sourceIP: string;\n    sourcePort: string;\n    destinationPort: string;\n    destinationIP?: string;\n    remoteDestination?: string;\n    process?: string;\n    processPath?: string;\n  };\n  upload: number;\n  download: number;\n  start: string;\n  chains: string[];\n  rule: string;\n  rulePayload: string;\n  /** 匹配到的具体规则内容，如 DOMAIN-SUFFIX,example.com（仅 RULE-SET 等有详情时存在） */\n  ruleDetail?: string;\n  curUpload?: number; // upload speed, calculate at runtime\n  curDownload?: number; // download speed, calculate at runtime\n}\n\ninterface IConnections {\n  downloadTotal: number;\n  uploadTotal: number;\n;\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const LayoutTraffic = \nconst iconStyle: any = {\n,\n  };\n  const valStyle: any = {\n    component: \"span\",\n    textAlign: \"center\",\n    sx: { flex: \"1 1 56px\", userSelect: \"none\" },\n  };\n  const unitStyle: any = {\n    component: \"span\",\n    color: \"grey.500\",\n    fontSize: \"12px\",\n    textAlign: \"right\",\n    sx: { flex: \"0 1 27px\", userSelect: \"none\" },\n  };\n\n  return (\n    \u003cLightweightTrafficErrorBoundary\u003e\n      \u003cBox position=\"relative\"\u003e\n        {trafficGraph \u0026\u0026 pageVisible \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cdiv\n            style={{ width: \"100%\", height: 60, marginBottom: 6 }}\n            onClick={trafficRef.current?.toggleStyle}\n          \u003e\n            \u003cTrafficGraph ref={trafficRef} /\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        )}\n\n        \u003cBox display=\"flex\" flexDirection=\"column\" gap={0.75}\u003e\n          \u003cBox\n            title={&#96;${t(\"home.components.traffic.metrics.uploadSpeed\")}&#96;}\n            {...boxStyle}\n            sx={{\n              ...boxStyle.sx,\n              // opacity: traffic?.is_fresh ? 1 : 0.6,\n            }}\n          \u003e\n            \u003cArrowUpwardRounded\n              {...iconStyle}\n              color={(traffic?.up || 0) \u003e 0 ? \"secondary\" : \"disabled\"}\n            /\u003e\n            \u003cTypography {...valStyle} color=\"secondary\"\u003e\n              {up}\n            \u003c/Typography\u003e\n            \u003cTypography {...unitStyle}\u003e{upUnit}/s\u003c/Typography\u003e\n          \u003c/Box\u003e\n\n          \u003cBox\n            title={&#96;${t(\"home.components.traffic.metrics.downloadSpeed\")}&#96;}\n            {...boxStyle}\n            sx={{\n              ...boxStyle.sx,\n              // opacity: traffic?.is_fresh ? 1 : 0.6,\n            }}\n          \u003e\n            \u003cArrowDownwardRounded\n              {...iconStyle}\n              color={(traffic?.down || 0) \u003e 0 ? \"primary\" : \"disabled\"}\n            /\u003e\n            \u003cTypography {...valStyle} color=\"primary\"\u003e\n              {down}\n            \u003c/Typography\u003e\n            \u003cTypography {...unitStyle}\u003e{downUnit}/s\u003c/Typography\u003e\n          \u003c/Box\u003e\n\n          {displayMemory \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cBox\n              title={&#96;${t(\"home.components.traffic.metrics.memoryUsage\")} &#96;}\n;",
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "{\n  \"page\": {\n    \"title\": \"连接\"\n  },\n  \"components\": {\n    \"fields\": {\n      \"host\": \"主机\",\n      \"dlSpeed\": \"下载速度\",\n      \"ulSpeed\": \"上传速度\",\n      \"chains\": \"链路\",\n      \"rule\": \"规则\",\n      \"process\": \"进程\",\n      \"time\": \"连接时间\",\n      \"source\": \"源地址\",\n      \"destination\": \"目标地址\",\n      \"destinationPort\": \"目标端口\",\n      \"type\": \"类型\"\n    },\n    \"order\": {\n      \"default\": \"默认\",\n      \"uploadSpeed\": \"上传速度\",\n      \"downloadSpeed\": \"下载速度\"\n    },\n    \"actions\": {\n      \"active\": \"活跃\",\n      \"closed\": \"已关闭\",\n      \"closeConnection\": \"关闭连接\"\n    },\n    \"columnManager\": {\n      \"title\": \"列设置\",\n      \"dragHandle\": \"拖拽控件\"\n    }\n  }\n}",

        "contents": "export const EnhancedTrafficStats = \n\n\n  // 渲染流量图表 - 使用useMemo缓存渲染结果\n  const trafficGraphComponent = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (!trafficGraph || !pageVisible) return null;\n\n    return (\n      \u003cPaper\n        elevation={0}\n        sx={{\n          height: 130,\n          cursor: \"pointer\",\n          border: &#96;1px solid ${alpha(theme.palette.divider, 0.2)}&#96;,\n          borderRadius: 2,\n          overflow: \"hidden\",\n        }}\n        onClick={() =\u003e trafficRef.current?.toggleStyle()}\n      \u003e\n        \u003cdiv style={{ height: \"100%\", position: \"relative\" }}\u003e\n          \u003cEnhancedCanvasTrafficGraph ref={trafficRef} /\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/Paper\u003e\n    );\n  }, [trafficGraph, pageVisible, theme.palette.divider]);\n\n  // 使用useMemo计算统计卡片配置\n  const statCards = useMemo(\n    () =\u003e [\n      {\n        icon: \u003cArrowUpwardRounded fontSize=\"small\" /\u003e,\n        title: t(\"home.components.traffic.metrics.uploadSpeed\"),\n        value: parsedData.up,\n        unit: &#96;${parsedData.upUnit}/s&#96;,\n        color: \"secondary\" as const,\n      },\n      {\n        icon: \u003cArrowDownwardRounded fontSize=\"small\" /\u003e,\n        title: t(\"home.components.traffic.metrics.downloadSpeed\"),\n        value: parsedData.down,\n        unit: &#96;${parsedData.downUnit}/s&#96;,\n        color: \"primary\" as const,\n      },\n      {\n        icon: \u003cLinkRounded fontSize=\"small\" /\u003e,\n        title: t(\"home.components.traffic.metrics.activeConnections\"),\n        value: parsedData.connectionsCount,\n        unit: \"\",\n        color: \"success\" as const,\n      },\n      {\n        icon:     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export interface ConnectionSpeedData {\n  id: string;\n  upload: number;\n  download: number;\n  timestamp: number;\n}\n\nexport const AppDataContext = createContext\u003cAppDataContextType | null\u003e(null);",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.core.model\n\nimport android.os.Parcel\nimport android.os.Parcelable\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.util.Parcelizer\nimport kotlinx.serialization.SerialName\nimport kotlinx.serialization.Serializable\n\n@Serializable\ndata class ConnectionsSnapshot(\n    val downloadTotal: Long = 0,\n    val uploadTotal: Long = 0,\n    val connections: List\u003cConnection\u003e = emptyList(),\n) : Parcelable {\n    override fun writeToParcel(parcel: Parcel, flags: Int) {\n        Parcelizer.encodeToParcel(serializer(), parcel, this)\n    }\n\n    override fun describeContents(): Int = 0\n\n    companion object CREATOR : Parcelable.Creator\u003cConnectionsSnapshot\u003e {\n        override fun createFromParcel(parcel: Parcel): ConnectionsSnapshot {\n            return Parcelizer.decodeFromParcel(serializer(), parcel)\n        }\n\n        override fun newArray(size: Int): Array\u003cConnectionsSnapshot?\u003e = arrayOfNulls(size)\n    }\n}\n\n@Serializable\ndata class Connection(\n    val id: String,\n    val metadata: ConnectionMetadata? = null,\n    val upload: Long = 0,\n    val download: Long = 0,\n    val start: String = \"\",\n    val chains: String = \"\",\n    @SerialName(\"providerChains\") val providerChains: String = \"\",\n    val rule: String = \"\",\n    val rulePayload: String = \"\",\n    val ruleDetail: String = \"\",\n) : Parcelable {\n    override fun writeToParcel(parcel: Parcel, flags: Int) {\n        Parcelizer.encodeToParcel(serializer(), parcel, this)\n    }\n\n    override fun describeContents(): Int = 0\n\n    companion object CREATOR : Parcelable.Creator\u003cConnection\u003e {\n        override fun createFromParcel(parcel: Parcel): Connection {\n            return Parcelizer.decodeFromParcel(serializer(), parcel)\n        }\n\n        override fun newArray(size: Int): Array\u003cConnection?\u003e = arrayOfNulls(size)\n    }\n}\n\n@Serializable\ndata class ConnectionMetadata(\n    val network: String = \"\",\n    val host: String = \"\",",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const EnhancedTrafficStats = () =\u003e {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const theme = useTheme();\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n  const trafficRef = useRef\u003cEnhancedCanvasTrafficGraphRef\u003e(null);\n  const pageVisible = useVisibility();\n\n  // 是否显示流量图表\n  const trafficGraph = verge?.traffic_graph ?? true;\n\n  const {\n    response: { data: traffic },\n  } = useTrafficData({ enabled: trafficGraph \u0026\u0026 pageVisible });\n\n  const {\n    response: { data: memory },\n  } = useMemoryData();\n\n  const {\n    response: { data: connections },\n  } = useConnectionData();\n\n  // Canvas组件现在直接从全局Hook获取数据，无需手动添加数据点\n\n  // 使用useMemo计算解析后的流量数据\n  const parsedData = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    const [up, upUnit] = parseTraffic(traffic?.up || 0);\n    const [down, downUnit] = parseTraffic(traffic?.down || 0);\n    const [inuse, inuseUnit] = parseTraffic(memory?.inuse || 0);\n    const [uploadTotal, uploadTotalUnit] = parseTraffic(\n      connections?.uploadTotal,\n    );\n    const [downloadTotal, downloadTotalUnit] = parseTraffic(\n      connections?.downloadTotal,\n    );\n\n    return {\n      up,\n      upUnit,\n      down,\n      downUnit,\n      inuse,\n      inuseUnit,\n      uploadTotal,\n      uploadTotalUnit,\n      downloadTotal,\n      downloadTotalUnit,\n      connectionsCount: connections?.activeConnections.length,\n    };\n  }, [traffic, memory, connections]);\n\n  // 渲染流量图表 - 使用useMemo缓存渲染结果\n  const trafficGraphComponent = useMemo\n;\n;",
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.adapter\n\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.Connection\n\n/**\n * Connection with precomputed traffic display text (download/upload amount and speed).\n */\ndata class ConnectionDisplayItem(\n    val connection: Connection,\n    val trafficDisplayText: String,\n)",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.adapter"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2

            "lineNumber": 3,

            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": " * Connection with precomputed traffic display text (download/upload amount and speed)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "data class ConnectionDisplayItem("
          },

            "lineNumber": 9,

          },
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package statistic\n\nimport (\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/atomic\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/buf\"\n\tN \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/net\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\n\t\"github.com/gofrs/uuid/v5\"\n)\n\ntype Tracker interface {\n\tID() string\n\tClose() error\n\tInfo() *TrackerInfo\n\tC.Connection\n}\n\ntype TrackerInfo struct {\n\tUUID          uuid.UUID    &#96;json:\"id\"&#96;\n\tMetadata      *C.Metadata  &#96;json:\"metadata\"&#96;\n\tUploadTotal   atomic.Int64 &#96;json:\"upload\"&#96;\n\tDownloadTotal atomic.Int64 &#96;json:\"download\"&#96;\n\tStart         time.Time    &#96;json:\"start\"&#96;\n\tChain         C.Chain      &#96;json:\"chains\"&#96;\n\tProviderChain C.Chain      &#96;json:\"providerChains\"&#96;\n\tRule          string       &#96;json:\"rule\"&#96;\n\tRulePayload   string       &#96;json:\"rulePayload\"&#96;\n\tRuleDetail    string       &#96;json:\"ruleDetail,omitempty\"&#96; // detailed match info for RULE-SET (e.g., \"DOMAIN-SUFFIX,example.com\")\n}\n\ntype tcpTracker struct {\n\tC.Conn &#96;json:\"-\"&#96;\n\t*TrackerInfo\n\tmanager *Manager\n\n\tpushToManager bool &#96;json:\"-\"&#96;\n}\n\nfunc (tt *tcpTracker) ID() string {\n\treturn tt.UUID.String()\n}\n\nfunc (tt *tcpTracker) Info() *TrackerInfo {\n\treturn tt.TrackerInfo\n}\n\nfunc (tt *tcpTracker) Read(b []byte) (int, error) {\n\tn, err := tt.Conn.Read(b)\n\tdownload := int64(n)\n\tif tt.pushToManager {\n\t\ttt.manager.PushDownloaded(download)\n\t}\n\ttt.DownloadTotal.Add(download)\n\treturn n, err\n}\n\nfunc (tt *tcpTracker) ReadBuffer(buffer *buf.Buffer) (err error) {\n\terr = tt.Conn.ReadBuffer(buffer)\n\tdownload := int64(buffer.Len())\n\tif tt.pushToManager {\n\t\ttt.manager.PushDownloaded(download)\n\t}\n\ttt.DownloadTotal.Add(download)\n\treturn\n}\n\nfunc (tt *tcpTracker) UnwrapReader() (io.Reader, []N.CountFunc) {\n\treturn tt.Conn, []N.CountFunc{func(download int64) {\n\t\tif tt.pushToManager {\n\t\t\ttt.manager.PushDownloaded(download)\n\t\t}\n\t\ttt.DownloadTotal.Add(download)\n\t}}\n}\n\nfunc (tt *tcpTracker) Write(b []byte)",

- ConnectionMetadata has: host, process, sourceIP, destinationPort (no remoteDestination, destinationIP etc.)

So when metadata is null we use connection.chains. But when metadata is not null we use connection.metadata.host. If host is empty we might show empty. I will check - the core Connection from Go might have different field names. I will look at how connections snapshot is received - maybe the issue is that when the connections screen first opens, patchConnections hasn't been called yet so displayItems is empty. Then when we call getItemId(0) we'd get displayItems[0] but if the list is empty we get IndexOutOfBoundsException!

Look at ConnectionAdapter:
- getItemId(position: Int): Long = displayItems[position].connection.id.hashCode().toLong()
- getItemCount(): Int = displayItems.size

So when the screen first opens, if patchConnections is called asynchronously, displayItems might still be empty. But getItemCount() would return 0 so no items would be bound. Unless... the RecyclerView or something requests item at position 0 before the data is set?

Actually the crash could be when entering the screen - maybe the ConnectionsDesign is shown and then patchConnections(snapshot) is called. Initially displayItems could be empty. So when we're in patchConnections we do:
withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
    adapter.patchDataSet(adapter::displayItems, displayItems, ...)
}

So we're setting displayItems. The patchDataSet - I need to check that. Maybe the issue is that when there are 0 connections, we pass empty list and something breaks?

Or - maybe the crash is in the layout binding. Look at line 49 again:
`connection.metadata.host` - in ConnectionMetadata we have `host: String = ""`. So that's fine. But wait, in the core Connection.kt we have ConnectionMetadata with:
- network, host, process, sourceIP, destinationPort

There's no remoteDestination or destinationIP in the Android ConnectionMetadata! But the clash-verge-rev (TypeScript) has metadata with remoteDestination, destinationPort, etc. So the Android app might be receiving connection data from the core (Go) and the core might be sending different field names. I will check how the snapshot is populated - is it from the Clash core API?

I will search for where ConnectionsSnapshot is created or received and how Connection metadata is mapped.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

The Go side uses `DstPort` with json tag `destinationPort,string` - so it serializes as string. The Kotlin ConnectionMetadata has `destinationPort: String = ""`. So that should match.

One potential issue: in the layout adapter_connection_item.xml line 84:
android:text="@{ruleDisplayText}"

If ruleDisplayText is null, this could cause a problem. But in ConnectionAdapter we set holder.binding.ruleDisplayText = ruleText where ruleText = formatRuleDisplay(conn), which returns a String (never null). So we're good.

Wait - I will look at the ConnectionAdapter again. It uses conn.ruleDetail - in the Kotlin model we have ruleDetail: String = "". So that's fine.

I will think about when the crash could happen "进入链接界面报错" - when entering the connection interface.

1. First time: setContentDesign(design) - the ConnectionsDesign root is shown. At this point adapter has displayItems = emptyList() (initial value). RecyclerView has adapter set, itemCount = 0. So no items are bound. Good.

2. refreshConnections(design) is called. If withClash { queryConnections() } throws (e.g. core not ready), we catch and call design.patchConnections(ConnectionsSnapshot(connections = emptyList())). So we pass empty list.

3. In patchConnections with empty list: displayItems = empty list, previousTraffic = emptyMap(), we call adapter.patchDataSet(adapter::displayItems, displayItems, ...). So we set adapter.displayItems = [] and dispatch updates. getItemCount() would be 0. So that's fine.

4. If queryConnections() succeeds and returns some connections: we build displayItems. For each conn we do conn.download.toBytesString() - conn.download is Long, toBytesString() is extension on Long. So that's fine. We could have an issue if conn is malformed? Unlikely.

Actually - one more possibility. In patchDataSet we do:
withContext(Dispatchers.Default) {
    property.get().diffWith(newDataset, detectMove, id)
}
So we're calling property.get() - that's adapter::displayItems which returns adapter.displayItems. So we get the current list. Then we diff. Then on Main we set property.set(newDataset) - so we set adapter.displayItems = displayItems. Then result.dispatchUpdatesTo(this@patchDataSet). So the adapter's data is updated first, then we notify. So when RecyclerView reacts to the notification and calls getItemCount(), getItemId(), onBindViewHolder(), the data is already set. Good.

I will check diffWith - could it throw or return something that causes dispatchUpdatesTo to misbehave?
</details></think>

ConnectionsDesign extends Design. So it has surface. In init we do binding.self = this. So when the layout is inflated, we have self = ConnectionsDesign instance. I will look at ConnectionDisplayItem again. It's a data class with connection and trafficDisplayText. When we use it in patchDataSet with id = { it.connection.id }, the id could be null if connection.id is null? But Connection has id: String (required, no default). So id is never null.

Actually - ConnectionAdapter.formatRuleDisplay uses conn.ruleDetail - in the Kotlin model we have ruleDetail. But wait, the Kotlin serialization uses @SerialName for some fields. I will check - in Connection we have rulePayload and ruleDetail without @SerialName. The JSON from Go uses "rulePayload" and "ruleDetail". Kotlin default is to use the same as the property name for serialization. So we're good.

One more thought: maybe the crash is in the databinding when ruleDisplayText is used without null check? In adapter_connection_item.xml line 84: android:text="@{ruleDisplayText}". If the binding is evaluated before onBindViewHolder sets ruleDisplayText, it could be null. So when the ViewHolder is created, the binding has default values - connection=null, ruleDisplayText=null, trafficDisplayText=null. Then we set them in onBindViewHolder. So when the view is first inflated, ruleDisplayText could be null. Setting android:text="@{ruleDisplayText}" with a null value - in Data Binding, setting text to null often results in no crash (it just doesn't set or sets empty). I will double-check - actually I'll add null safety to ruleDisplayText in the layout to be safe.

Actually the user said "进入链接界面报错" - they get an error when entering the connection interface. So the crash could be:
1. When the activity starts and sets the design
2. When the first refreshConnections runs (maybe queryConnections() throws?)
3. When the RecyclerView tries to bind the first batch of items

If queryConnections() throws (e.g. core not started, or JSON parse error due to schema mismatch), we catch and call patchConnections(emptyList()). So we shouldn't crash there.

What if the JSON from the core has a different structure sometimes? For example, what if metadata is missing and we have connection.metadata.host in the layout - we have connection.metadata != null ? connection.metadata.host : connection.chains, so we're safe.

I will check - in ConnectionAdapter we have conn.metadata?.process - we're safe. We use conn.chains, conn.rule, conn.ruleDetail, conn.rulePayload - all have default values in the model.

+    /** When true, newest connections first (descending by start time). */

     suspend fun patchConnections(snapshot: ConnectionsSnapshot) {

+        val sorted = snapshot.connections.sortedBy { it.start }.let { list -&gt;
+            if (sortNewestFirst) list.asReversed() else list
+        }

-            adapter.notifyDataSetChanged()
+            adapter.patchDataSet(adapter::connections, snapshot.connections, detectMove = true) { it.id }
         }
     }
 
diff --git a/design/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/design/adapter/ConnectionAdapter.kt b/design/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/design/adapter/ConnectionAdapter.kt
index 019715b..7cbfa27 100644
--- a/design/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/design/adapter/ConnectionAdapter.kt
+++ b/design/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/design/adapter/ConnectionAdapter.kt
@@ -16,6 +16,12 @@ class ConnectionAdapter(
 
     var connections: List&lt;Connection&gt; = emptyList()
 
+    init {
+        setHasStableIds(true)
+    }
+
+    override fun getItemId(position: Int): Long = connections[position].id.hashCode().toLong()
+
     override fun onCreateViewHolder(parent: ViewGroup, viewType: Int): Holder {
         return Holder(
             AdapterConnectionItemBinding.inflate(context.layoutInflater, parent, false)
@@ -25,12 +31,38 @@ class ConnectionAdapter(
     override fun onBindViewHolder(holder: Holder, position: Int) {
         val conn = connections[position]
         holder.binding.connection = conn
+        val ruleText = formatRuleDisplay(conn)
+        holder.binding.ruleDisplayText = ruleText
+        holder.binding.ruleDisplayView.visibility = if (ruleText.isNotEmpty()) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
         val processView = holder.binding.processView
         val process = conn.metadata?.process?.takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
         processView.text = process
         processView.visibility = if (process != null) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
+        val iconView = holder.binding.appIconView
+        if (process != null) {
+            try {
+                iconView.setImageDrawable(context.packageManager.getApplicationIcon(process))
+                iconView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
+            } catch (_: Exception) {
+                iconView.visibility = View.GONE
+            }
+        } else {
+            iconView.visibility = View.GONE
+        }
         holder.binding.closeView.setOnClickListener { onClose(conn) }
     }
 
     override fun getItemCount(): Int = connections.size
+
+    private fun formatRuleDisplay(conn: Connection): String {
+        return buildString {
+            append(conn.chains)
+            if (conn.rule.isNotEmpty()) {
+                append(" --&gt; [")
+                append(conn.rule)
+                if (conn.ruleDetail.isNotEmpty()) append(",").append(conn.ruleDetail)
+                append("]")
+            }
+        }
+    }
 }

Actually - one critical finding: in patchDataSet we do:
1. result = diffWith(property.get(), newDataset, ...) on Default dispatcher
2. withContext(Main) { property.set(newDataset); result.dispatchUpdatesTo(this@patchDataSet) }

So we SET the property (adapter.displayItems = displayItems) and THEN dispatch updates. So when dispatchUpdatesTo runs (e.g. notifyItemRangeInserted(0, 5)), the RecyclerView will call getItemCount() which returns displayItems.size - correct. It might call getItemId(0), getItemId(1), ... which access displayItems[position].connection.id - correct. So the data is already set.

BUT - what if the RecyclerView is in a state where it hasn't attached the adapter yet? Or what if there's a race? Actually, I will think about the first time we enter the screen:
1. setContentDesign(design) - design.root is added to the view hierarchy. The RecyclerView is in the layout. The adapter is set in init: binding.recyclerList.applyLinearAdapter(context, adapter). So when the design is created, we set adapter on RecyclerView. At that point adapter.displayItems is emptyList().
2. refreshConnections(design) is called. It's a suspend function. So we await queryConnections(), then we call design.patchConnections(snapshot). patchConnections is suspend. So we run the sorted.map { ... } on the current thread (probably Main since we're in the activity's main() which uses a single thread?). Actually main() is a suspend function and we're in a coroutine. So we're not necessarily on Main. We run the displayItems computation (could be on Default if the caller is). Then we withContext(Dispatchers.Main) { property.set(newDataset); result.dispatchUpdatesTo(...) }. So we switch to Main, set displayItems, then notify. So we're good.

One more possibility: when displayItems is empty and we're doing the first patchConnections(emptyList()) - e.g. when queryConnections() throws. We do diffWith(emptyList(), emptyList(), ...). So oldList.size=0, newList.size=0. DiffUtil.calculateDiff with both lists empty - getOldListSize()=0, getNewListSize()=0. So the callback methods might not be called with any positions? I will check - areItemsTheSame(0, 0) would be called? No, when both lists are size 0, typically no comparisons are done. So result.dispatchUpdatesTo(adapter) - we'd dispatch no updates. And we set property.set(emptyList()). So adapter.displayItems = []. Good.

When we have items: we set adapter.displayItems = displayItems (the new list), then dispatchUpdatesTo. So when the adapter's notifyItemRangeInserted is called, RecyclerView might call getItemCount() - which returns the new size. getItemId(position) - which uses displayItems[position]. So we're good.

I will check the layout again. Maybe the issue is that the layout adapter_connection_item has a variable "ruleDisplayText" that can be null and we're not handling it? Line 84: android:text="@{ruleDisplayText}" - if ruleDisplayText is null, in Data Binding the generated code might assign null to setText. In Android, textView.setText(null) might throw or behave badly in some API levels. I will add null safety: android:text="@{ruleDisplayText != null ? ruleDisplayText : ``}"

Actually I'll search for whether there are any other designs that set binding before the view is attached - like binding.self = this in ConnectionsDesign init. So when we do binding.self = this, the layout design_connections.xml has views that reference self.surface.insets.start. So when the binding is executed (when the view is attached or when we need to bind), it will read self.surface.insets. The Design base class sets surface.insets in the init when context is AppCompatActivity - it uses setOnInsertsChangedListener. So the insets might be set asynchronously when the window is ready! So when the view first loads, surface.insets might still be Insets.EMPTY (default). So we'd have insets.start = 0, etc. So that should be fine, not null.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

I notice that in the layout line 49 we have:
android:text="@{connection.metadata != null ? connection.metadata.host : connection.chains}"

If connection is null (e.g. when ViewHolder is first created before onBindViewHolder), we'd get NPE. When is the binding executed? When we inflate the view, the binding has default values - connection=null, ruleDisplayText=null, trafficDisplayText=null. So when the view is first inflated, connection could be null! So connection.metadata would throw NPE!

That's the bug! When the RecyclerView creates a new ViewHolder via onCreateViewHolder, it inflates the layout. The data binding variables have default null values. So connection is null. Then when the layout is evaluated (e.g. when the view is attached or when we set the binding variables), if the layout tries to evaluate connection.metadata before we set connection, we get NPE.

Actually - when do we set the binding variables? In onBindViewHolder. So the order is: 1) onCreateViewHolder inflates the view - at this point binding.connection is null (default). 2) The inflated view might trigger binding evaluation - e.g. when the view is attached to the window. So we'd have connection=null and the expression connection.metadata != null ? ... would try to access connection.metadata, which would be NPE because connection is null!

So the fix is to add null safety for connection in the layout: android:text="@{connection != null ? (connection.metadata != null ? connection.metadata.host : connection.chains) : ``}"

I will also add null safety for ruleDisplayText on line 84 since it could be null before binding: android:text="@{ruleDisplayText != null ? ruleDisplayText : ``}"

I'll make the fix.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

Good, I've added null safety. But wait - the user said the error happens when "进入链接界面" - when entering the connection interface. So the crash could be when the activity first loads. At that moment:
1. ConnectionsDesign is created
2. setContentDesign(design) is called - the root view is added
3. refreshConnections(design) is called

When the design is created, in init we set binding.self = this and binding.recyclerList.applyLinearAdapter(context, adapter). So the RecyclerView gets the adapter. The adapter has displayItems = emptyList(). So getItemCount() = 0. So no ViewHolders are created yet!

Then refreshConnections runs. If it succeeds, we get snapshot with connections. We call patchConnections(snapshot). We build displayItems and then withContext(Main) { property.set(displayItems); dispatchUpdatesTo(adapter) }. So we set adapter.displayItems = [item1, item2, ...] and notify. Now the RecyclerView will create ViewHolders. So it calls onCreateViewHolder - inflates the layout. At that moment the binding has connection=null, etc. Then it calls onBindViewHolder(holder, 0). We set holder.binding.connection = conn, holder.binding.trafficDisplayText = ..., etc. So we set the values. But - does the binding get evaluated before or after we set the values? We set the values in onBindViewHolder, so we set them before the view is displayed. So when we set holder.binding.connection = conn, the binding should update. So connection should not be null when the view is displayed.

Unless - the Data Binding library evaluates the binding when the view is attached, and there's a race where the view gets attached before onBindViewHolder completes? Or maybe the binding is evaluated synchronously when we set the variables, and at that moment we've set connection but the layout might have multiple views and one of them might be evaluated with stale null? Unlikely.

Actually another possibility: when we use notifyItemRangeInserted, the RecyclerView might create a new ViewHolder and then call onBindViewHolder. So the order is: create ViewHolder (inflate - binding has nulls), then onBindViewHolder (we set all variables). So after onBindViewHolder, all variables are set. So when would connection be null? Unless the view is recycled. When the view is recycled, we don't clear the binding. So when the ViewHolder is recycled and reused for another position, we call onBindViewHolder again with new data. So we'd set the new connection. So we're good.

But when the ViewHolder is first created, we inflate the layout. The binding is created with default values (null for connection, etc.). So when the view hierarchy is inflated, the binding might immediately try to update the views. So the first line that gets evaluated might be connection.metadata - and connection is null! So we get NPE. So adding connection != null check should fix it.

I will also verify - could there be any other place that might cause crash? In ConnectionAdapter we have holder.binding.ruleDisplayText = ruleText. So we always set it. But the default value before onBindViewHolder is null. So when the view is first inflated, ruleDisplayText is null. So the layout's android:text="@{ruleDisplayText}" would try to set text to null. In Android, TextView.setText(null) - I think it might throw or show "null" in older APIs. So adding null check for ruleDisplayText is good too.

I've made the fix. I will summarize for the user.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_


已经按空安全修好了布局，原因和改动如下。

**原因说明**

连接界面最近改成了用 `ConnectionDisplayItem` 显示下载量/下载速度，并给列表项加了 `traffic_display_view` 和新的 data binding 变量。  
在 **RecyclerView 刚创建 ViewHolder** 时，会先 inflate `adapter_connection_item.xml`，此时 binding 里的变量还是默认值：

- `connection` = null  
- `ruleDisplayText` = null  
- `trafficDisplayText` = null  

随后才会在 `onBindViewHolder` 里被赋值。若在赋值前就计算表达式（例如视图 attach 时），布局里会先访问 `connection`，从而在 **“进入链接界面”** 时触发 **NPE**：

1. **第 49 行**：`connection.metadata != null ? connection.metadata.host : connection.chains` 在 `connection == null` 时访问 `connection.metadata` 会 NPE。  
2. **第 84 行**：`ruleDisplayText` 在未绑定前为 null，直接用于 `android:text` 也可能在部分机型/版本上出问题。

**已做修改**

1. **第 49 行**：先判断 `connection != null`，再访问 `metadata` / `chains`，否则用空字符串：
   - `connection != null ? (connection.metadata != null ? connection.metadata.host : connection.chains) : ""`

2. **第 84 行**：对 `ruleDisplayText` 做空判断，为 null 时用空字符串：
   - `ruleDisplayText != null ? ruleDisplayText : ""`

这样在 ViewHolder 刚创建、binding 尚未在 `onBindViewHolder` 里赋值时，布局表达式也不会再访问 null，进入连接界面时的报错应会消失。请重新编译并在安卓端再进一次连接界面验证。
